ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_seed" TEXT /* Seed of the team in the tournament */,
  "team_region" TEXT /* Region of the team in the tournament */,
  "playin_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the team is a play-in team */,
  "team_alive" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the team is still alive in the tournament */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current national rank of the team */,
  "average_points" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "average_points_allowed" REAL /* Average points allowed per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team in the game */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team in the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round the game is in */,
  "neutral_site" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the game is at a neutral site */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "tv_coverage" TEXT /* TV network covering the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being predicted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the prediction */,
  "predicted_winner" INTEGER /* ID of the team predicted to win */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (0-1) */,
  "prediction_notes" TEXT /* User's notes or reasoning for the prediction */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction after the game outcome is known */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "prediction_success_rate" REAL /* Overall success rate of the user's predictions */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the round (e.g. Round of 64, Round of 32) */,
  "round_order" INTEGER /* Order of the round in the tournament */,
  "round_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round */,
  "win_probability" REAL /* Probability of the team winning the round */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team in the round */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Points allowed by the team in the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_outcomes" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "loser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "game_score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "overtime_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_outcomes_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_outcomes_loser_id FOREIGN KEY ("loser_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team */,
  "conference_wins" INTEGER /* Number of conference wins */,
  "conference_losses" INTEGER /* Number of conference losses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strengths" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "strength_name" TEXT /* Name of the strength (e.g. defense, offense) */,
  "strength_value" REAL /* Value of the strength (e.g. 0-1) */,
  "strength_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the strength */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "strength_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "weaknesses" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "weakness_name" TEXT /* Name of the weakness (e.g. defense, offense) */,
  "weakness_value" REAL /* Value of the weakness (e.g. 0-1) */,
  "weakness_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the weakness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "weakness_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions_history" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being predicted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the prediction */,
  "predicted_winner" INTEGER /* ID of the team predicted to win */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (0-1) */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_outcome" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the prediction was correct (1) or incorrect (0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_history_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
